---
name: Good first issue
about: Small scoped task suitable for a first contribution
title: "[Good first issue]: "
labels: good-first-issue
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

State the exact small improvement to make.

## Files likely involved

- `path/to/file`

## Why this is a good first issue

Explain why the task is small, bounded, and reviewable.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The change is limited to the listed files or a clearly explained adjacent file.
- [ ] The PR includes a short verification note.
- [ ] The PR does not touch secrets, private config, wallets, keys, or live deployment settings.
